description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a detachable keyboard and a large touchscreen display, reminiscent of a Microsoft Surface device. The front features a black keyboard with a spacious trackpad and a high-resolution screen displaying a Windows operating system interface. The device is supported by a rear kickstand, allowing it to stand upright on flat surfaces. The back panel is metallic gray with a prominent square logo in the center and a small camera at the top. The sides of the laptop show multiple ports, including USB and headphone jacks, as well as ventilation slots. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for both work and casual use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, metallic gray laptop with a detachable black keyboard, touchscreen display, and rear kickstand. Features a prominent logo on the back and multiple side ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black keyboard, large trackpad, and touchscreen displaying the Windows desktop.
description_view_1: Left angled side view highlighting the slim profile, side ports, and the extended rear kickstand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the metallic gray back, central square logo, and top camera.
description_view_3: Right angled side view showing the keyboard, screen, and additional side ports with the kickstand extended.
attribute_brand_logo: A black square logo with four smaller squares arranged in a 2x2 grid, centered on the back panel.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a Windows desktop interface with icons and a wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and standard keys, no numeric keypad visible.
